title: Theme: Travel and Airport
description: Useful vocabulary and phrases for traveling by plane.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora sale el próximo vuelo para Madrid?
sentences.english: What time does the next flight to Madrid leave?

sentences.spanish: Necesito facturar mis maletas antes de ir a la puerta de embarque.
sentences.english: I need to check my bags before going to the boarding gate.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me puede dar un asiento de pasillo, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you give me an aisle seat, please?

sentences.spanish: El vuelo tiene un retraso de dos horas debido al mal tiempo.
sentences.english: The flight has a two-hour delay due to bad weather.

sentences.spanish: Por favor, muestre su pasaporte y su tarjeta de embarque.
sentences.english: Please show your passport and your boarding pass.
Where can I pick up my luggage?

sentences.spanish: El control de seguridad está muy lleno esta mañana.
sentences.english: The security check is very full this morning.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene algo que declarar en la aduana?
sentences.english: Do you have anything to declare at customs?

sentences.spanish: El avión está a punto de aterrizar en el aeropuerto internacional.
sentences.english: The plane is about to land at the international airport.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero viajar en clase ejecutiva para tener más espacio.
sentences.english: I prefer to travel in business class to have more space.
